findings.message: CLAUDE.md contains a single @AGENTS.md import; AGENTS.md itself is only 4 lines — combined provides minimal project-specific AI context
CLAUDE.md delegates entirely to @AGENTS.md; AGENTS.md provides only a 4-line Next.js version caution with no template skill conventions, category taxonomy, or output format guidance
xlsx: ^0.18.5 — SheetJS was removed from the npm public registry; ^0.18.5 is the last public release (~2022) with no further security patches on npm
23 of 25 package.json dependencies use ^ (caret) semver ranges, allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades that may introduce regressions or vulnerabilities

Pattern: 18 files have 4-line bodies with section names only (no hex colors, no font specs, no output format); representative: dashboard, dating-web, docs-page, team-okrs, pricing-page, meeting-notes, mobile-app, deck-presenter-mode, wireframe-sketch, social-media-dashboard

Pattern: 19 files have 4-7 line bodies with partial specs (layout described, design brief, no typography or explicit HTML output); representative: deck-blueprint, deck-graphify-dark, hr-onboarding, kanban-board, pm-spec, finance-report, eng-runbook, saas-landing
References 8 named theme variants (helix/holm/vance/bevel/world-dark/world-mint/atlas/bluehouse) without specifying any color palettes — agent must guess theme colors
Body only 3 lines; layout and design collapsed to a single brief entry; no color or font spec
'合理坐标' (reasonable coordinates) for auto-estimated schematic data — no range or rounding rule specified
'合理年份 / 章节 / 地点' (reasonable year/chapter/location metadata) — ambiguous without a fallback rule
Body only 3 lines of design detail after layout section; missing font, color, animation, and output format specs
Body only 3 lines; no design detail beyond screen enumeration; no font, color, or CSS output spec
Body only 7 lines; no CSS/HTML output format stated, no font families, no color palette — insufficient for consistent AI output
Body only 4 lines; no color palette, no font specification, no technical output details
'合理的 subreddit / username / 票数' (reasonable subreddit/username/votes) — no default fallback values or generation rule specified
Body only 4 lines; no color palette, no typography spec, no technical output declaration
Body only 4 lines; no technical output details beyond a four-item design concept list
Body only 4 lines; four bullet points with no color, font, or CSS specifications — insufficient specification for consistent AI output
Body only 7 lines; no CSS/HTML output format stated, no font families, no color palette — insufficient for consistent AI output
Body only 4 lines; four bullet points with no color, font, or CSS specifications — insufficient specification for consistent AI output
Body only 4 lines; no color palette, no typography spec, no technical output declaration
Body only 4 lines; no technical output details beyond a four-item design concept list
Body only 3 lines of design detail after layout section; missing font, color, animation, and output format specs
Body only 3 lines; layout and design collapsed to a single brief entry; no color or font spec
Body only 3 lines; no design detail beyond screen enumeration; no font, color, or CSS output spec
Body only 4 lines; no color palette, no font specification, no technical output details
'合理坐标' (reasonable coordinates) for auto-estimated schematic data — no range or rounding rule specified
'合理的 subreddit / username / 票数' (reasonable subreddit/username/votes) — no default fallback values or generation rule specified
'合理年份 / 章节 / 地点' (reasonable year/chapter/location metadata) — ambiguous without a fallback rule
